description: Sums of money donated by members of the Jewish community in Cairo. ENA 2348.4	mentions Ibn al-Abraṣ, who may be the grandfather of the physician in the qāḍī-court document T-S Ar.38.131 + T-S Ar.42.212 (PGPID 8228). Another is Shemuʾel ha-Levi Khashāʿ, who appears in the qāḍī-court document as Shamīl b. Naṣr b. Ṣedaqa, known as Ibn al-Khashāʿ. (Information from Dotan Arad.) The list must therefore date to around 1460 CE.
tags: late donations, donations, list, Coptic alphanumeral
description_he: סכומי כסף שתרמו בני הקהילה היהודית בקהיר. מוזכרים אבן אל-אברץ' ושמואל הלוי ח'שאע. הרשימה מתוארכת לכ-1460 לספירה.
